text: Stepping into this luminous, filtered space, I am poised between curiosity and alertness. The reflective glass and the sharp glow of blue beckon with the promise of innovation and research. Within, the wall text and digital displays unify past, present, and possibility. I feel as if I am inside an experiment—half observer, half participant—questioning my own purpose in the unfolding dance between documentation and discovery. Here, the ambiguity is oddly comforting: it is a space for thought, for searching, and for assembling meaning piece by piece.
